title: NXClickEvent
description: Base click event class for NX components that extends NXNativeEvent with MouseEvent.

sections.title: Class Definition
sections.description: Base NX click event class that provides mouse event functionality.

data.content: export class NXClickEvent<T extends NXComponent = NXComponent> extends NXNativeEvent<T, MouseEvent> {}

props.name: sender
props.description: The NX component that sent the event. Inherited from NXEvent.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The native mouse event. Inherited from NXNativeEvent.
